title: TIM - Process Indicators Against Organizations External IP List
content:
This playbook processes indicators to check if they exist in a Cortex XSOAR list containing the organizational External IP addresses or CIDR, and tags the indicators accordingly.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (TIM_Processing, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.

Inputs — OrganizationsExternalIPList: A Cortex XSOAR list containing the organization's External IP address values. The value should be taken from the Lists inputs. The list should be with comma separated values.; OrganizationsExternalCIDRList: A Cortex XSOAR list containing the organization's External CIDR values. The value should be taken from the Lists inputs. The list should be with comma separated values..
